message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker with new tasks for indirect block writes and mount-time operations

Adds new beads entries tracking recently completed work (double/triple indirect
block writes for e2compr, fast-commit operations at mount time) and upcoming
tasks in the frankenfs roadmap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
